items.title: Fully insured
items.description: Coverage for every visit and every team member.

items.title: Carefully vetted
items.description: Background-checked cleaners trained to our standards.

items.title: Satisfaction promise
items.description: Tell us within 24 hours and we will make it right.

items.title: Flexible scheduling
items.description: One-time, weekly, biweekly, or custom service plans.

services.title: The right clean for every room
services.description: From regular home care to detailed workplace resets, each service follows a clear scope and quality checklist.

items.name: Residential cleaning
items.description: Reliable whole-home care for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and shared spaces.

items.name: Office cleaning
items.description: Discreet daytime or evening cleaning for offices, studios, and shared workspaces.
items.imageAlt: Professional team cleaning a contemporary office

items.name: Deep cleaning
items.description: Detailed attention for buildup, overlooked corners, fixtures, baseboards, and high-touch surfaces.

items.name: Move-in and move-out
items.description: An empty-space reset that helps handovers, deposits, and new beginnings go smoothly.

items.name: Recurring care
items.description: A consistent team, familiar priorities, and a schedule that keeps your space comfortably maintained.

process.title: Simple from quote to clean
process.description: Clear communication and a familiar routine make professional cleaning easy to keep on your calendar.
process.imageAlt: Cleaning professionals caring for a bright modern office

steps.title: Tell us about your space
steps.description: Share the size, priorities, preferred timing, and any special instructions.

steps.title: Approve your plan
steps.description: We confirm scope, transparent pricing, arrival details, and your cleaning team.

steps.title: We clean with care
steps.description: Your team follows a room-by-room checklist and respects your belongings.

steps.title: Review the result
steps.description: A final quality check closes each visit, with simple follow-up if needed.

packages.title: Straightforward service plans
packages.description: Choose a starting point, then personalize frequency, rooms, and add-ons during your quote.

items.description: A dependable maintenance visit for homes that deserve consistent care.

items.name: One-time deep clean

items.name: Workplace care
items.description: Flexible cleaning for small offices, studios, clinics, and customer-facing spaces.

testimonials.title: Trusted with the spaces that matter
testimonials.description: Clients value the consistency, care, and calm our teams bring to every appointment.

items.quote: The same thoughtful team arrives every other week, notices the details, and leaves the house genuinely calm.
items.name: Marisol Bennett

items.quote: Our studio is ready for clients every morning, with no disruption to the team.
items.name: Devon Park

items.quote: The move-out clean was thorough, clearly scoped, and finished exactly when promised.

areas.title: Local teams across Chicago

contact.title: Tell us what needs care
